scripts.build: tsdown src/index.ts src/workspace/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --sourcemap --clean --platform browser --out-dir dist && npm run build:styles
scripts.build:watch: tsdown src/index.ts src/workspace/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --sourcemap --platform browser --out-dir dist --watch
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run build:watch" "npm run watch:styles" "npm run watch:wasm"
scripts.watch:wasm: cargo watch -C ../.. -w src -s "wasm-pack build --dev --target web --out-dir packages/chart-sdk/pkg"
